Authority
Most Common Mistakes
● Confusing being an authority with being in authority
● Introducing ourselves and our areas of expertise
instead of having a respected, 3rd party do it
● Assuming that experts are always trustworthy and
confusing trust for expertise
● Never admitting or revealing a weakness in your
position or proposition
● Admitting a weakness at the end of a proposal
● Confusing reviews of authorities with social proof
● Misusing the word “but”
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 1 --
